response.justification: Bogdan is a Staff/Senior Software Developer with 15+ years of experience across embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, and AI infrastructure — making him severely overqualified for an entry-level individual contributor role. While his TypeScript, React, and AWS skills directly match the technical requirements, and he brings strong software craftsmanship values (TDD, clean architecture), the seniority and compensation expectations are almost certainly incompatible with a junior/mid position. Pursuing this candidacy would likely waste both parties' time unless the company is actively looking to hire above the posted band.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and full-stack proficiency with React and Node.js/REST APIs, directly covering the core required stack
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, pairing) aligns with the role's clean architecture interest
AWS (CDK, ECS-adjacent tooling) and Kubernetes experience satisfies multiple nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Grossly overqualified — 15+ years at Staff/Senior level vs. an entry-level role; retention risk and salary misalignment are near-certain
PostgreSQL not mentioned; database experience leans heavily toward MongoDB and MySQL, which are not the preferred stack
No Nest.js experience visible in the resume, despite it being a named framework preference for the role
